omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Legal Requirement – There may be instances when we disclose Your information to comply with the law or respond to compulsory legal process or to protect the safety, property, or rights of KaHa, our business partners, or customers. There may be instances when we disclose Your information to any of our respective affiliates, business partners, or customers. Please rest assured We will share Your information only after conducting a due diligence of the legal request and only sharing specific and relevant information.
